content:
AI is being transformed into a foundational technology like electricity, built on a layered stack that begins with raw energy and ends with real-world applications. This "5-layer cake" framework shows how deeply interconnected each component is, from power to chips to models and apps.

• The foundation is energy, as AI systems consume vast amounts of electricity to operate continuously.
• Chips sit above energy, acting as computational engines that turn power into complex calculations.
• Massive physical infrastructure—cooling, networking, and space—is needed to connect tens of thousands of chips.
• On top, models and applications deliver intelligence and value, while relying entirely on all lower layers.
